mapper.update: INSERT INTO ST_STOCK_MASTER (ID, CREATE_DATE, UPDATE_DATE, DELETE_YN, STOCK_ID, NAME, PRICE, MARKET_CAPITALIZATION, VOLUMN) VALUES (get_seq('ST_STOCK_MASTER'), NOW(), NOW(), 'N', #{stockId}, #{name}, #{price}, #{marketCapitalization}, #{volumn}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE UPDATE_DATE = NOW(), DELETE_YN = 'N', NAME = IF(#{name} IS NULL OR #{name} = '', NAME, #{name}), PRICE = IF(#{price} IS NULL OR #{price} = '' OR #{price} = '0', PRICE, #{price}), MARKET_CAPITALIZATION = #{marketCapitalization}, VOLUMN = #{volumn}

UPDATE ST_STOCK_MASTER SET DELETE_YN = 'Y', UPDATE_DATE = NOW() WHERE DELETE_YN = 'N' AND STOCK_ID NOT IN
#{sid}
UPDATE ST_STOCK_MASTER SET DELETE_YN = 'N', UPDATE_DATE = NOW() WHERE STOCK_ID = #{value} AND DELETE_YN = 'Y'
mapper.select:
SELECT ID id, CREATE_DATE createDate, UPDATE_DATE updateDate, DELETE_YN deleteYn, STOCK_ID stockId, NAME name, PRICE price, PRICE_BEFOREDAY priceBeforeday, MARKET_CAPITALIZATION marketCapitalization, STOCK_QTY stockQty, VOLUMN volumn, PER per, ROE roe, PBR pbr, DIVIDEND_RATE dividendRate FROM ST_STOCK_MASTER
AND DELETE_YN = 'N'
AND STOCK_ID = #{stockId}
AND NAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%')
ORDER BY CAST(REPLACE(MARKET_CAPITALIZATION, ',', '') AS UNSIGNED) DESC
mapper.update: INSERT INTO ST_STOCK_DAILY_PRICE (ID, STOCK_ID, TRADING_DATE, CLOSING_PRICE, PREVIOUS_DAY_RATE, FLUCTUATION_RATE, VOLUMN) VALUES (get_seq('ST_STOCK_DAILY_PRICE'), #{stockId}, #{tradingDate}, #{closingPrice}, #{previousDayRate}, #{fluctuationRate}, #{volumn}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE CLOSING_PRICE = #{closingPrice}, PREVIOUS_DAY_RATE = #{previousDayRate}, FLUCTUATION_RATE = #{fluctuationRate}, VOLUMN = #{volumn}

INSERT INTO ST_STOCK_CATEGORY (ID, CATEGORY_TYPE, CATEGORY_NO, CATEGORY_NAME) VALUES (get_seq('ST_STOCK_CATEGORY'), #{categoryType}, #{categoryNo}, #{categoryName}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE CATEGORY_TYPE = #{categoryType}, CATEGORY_NAME = #{categoryName}

INSERT INTO ST_STOCK_CATEGORY_LINK (ID, CATEGORY_NO, STOCK_ID) VALUES (get_seq('ST_STOCK_CATEGORY_LINK'), #{categoryNo}, #{stockId}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE CATEGORY_NO = #{categoryNo}, STOCK_ID = #{stockId}

INSERT INTO ST_STOCK_MASTER (ID, CREATE_DATE, UPDATE_DATE, DELETE_YN, STOCK_ID, NAME, PRICE, MARKET_CAPITALIZATION, VOLUMN) VALUES (get_seq('ST_STOCK_MASTER'), NOW(), NOW(), 'N', #{stockId}, #{name}, #{price}, #{marketCapitalization}, #{volumn}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE UPDATE_DATE = NOW(), DELETE_YN = 'N', NAME = IF(#{name} IS NULL OR #{name} = '', NAME, #{name}), PRICE = IF(#{price} IS NULL OR #{price} = '' OR #{price} = '0', PRICE, #{price}), MARKET_CAPITALIZATION = #{marketCapitalization}, VOLUMN = #{volumn}
